summary: Post-migration (CRA -> Vite 5) frontend-only E2E validation. All 13 items from the review request PASSED (36/36 Playwright assertions). Vite dev server serves http://localhost:3000 correctly, Landing renders with all 8 testids, dark theme body bg is rgb(11,15,25), React Router works under Vite (/chat nav, /nonexistent redirect to /), Chat page renders all testids (sidebar, empty state, 4 suggestions, input, send/clear/back-home). Send flow: suggestion-0 click -> POST /api/chat proxied to localhost:8000 (offline) -> user bubble persists, typing indicator shows briefly, chat-error-banner + error chat-message-ai appear, no crash. Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts newline without sending, send-btn disabled when input empty, chat-clear-btn returns to empty state, chat-back-home-btn returns to /. Upload flow: /tmp/vite_upload.txt selected via sidebar-file-input -> POST /api/upload fails via dev proxy -> sidebar-doc-item rendered with failed status (no crash). Production build (`yarn build`) exits 0 and produces /app/frontend/dist/index.html + /app/frontend/dist/assets/index-*.js + index-*.css. Sidebar footer correctly shows '(same origin / proxy)' when VITE_API_URL is empty (Sidebar.jsx:202).
critical_code_review_comments: Vite dev proxy returns HTTP 500 (instead of ECONNREFUSED) when target localhost:8000 is down; the UI still handles it as an error state. Behavior is fine; just a minor diff from CRA console output (was ERR_NETWORK).

HMR websocket config uses clientPort:443 / wss; harmless in this environment (one ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED on /?token=... at load) but worth guarding with an env flag if not running behind the Emergent preview proxy.
React Router v6 future-flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) still present - cosmetic only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vite migration verified. Frontend served at http://localhost:3000 by supervisor (yarn start -> vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000). Backend at localhost:8000 is INTENTIONALLY offline; dev proxy forwards /api to it so POST /api/chat and /api/upload fail by design and UI must show the error state. Production build writes to /app/frontend/dist/. All data-testids preserved from iteration_1. Sidebar shows '(same origin / proxy)' when VITE_API_URL is empty (confirmed).
